title: rpc:chunk event payload
description: Payload emitted by agent for each chunk of a streaming result

stream_id.description: Unique identifier for the stream session

request_id.description: Original request ID that initiated the stream

chunk_index.description: Zero-based index of this chunk in the stream

rows.description: Array of row objects in this chunk

total_chunks.description: Total expected chunks (when known in advance)

column_metadata.description: Column metadata (sent on first chunk only)
